Artadia Awards 2013 Angeles Awardees are: Cayetano Ferrer, Nicole Miller, Vishal Jugdeo, Stanya Kahn Kerry Tribe.
consecutive days (November 11-12, 2013), three internationally known jurors: Subotnick, Curator, Hammer Museum, University Angeles, California; Magnolia Garza, Associate Curator, Museo Rufino Tamayo, Mexico City; Joao Ribas, most recently MIT's List Visual Center-conducted 45-minute studio visits with each short-listed artists.
Finalists were chosen from over visual applicants living working Angeles County.
recipients 2013 Artadia Angeles Awards $15,000 level are: Cayetano Ferrer Nicole Miller.
three recipients $3,000 awards are: Vishal Jugdeo, Stanya Kahn Kerry Tribe.
This Artadia's first award cycle Angeles.

Since 1998, Artadia recognized artistic excellence cities across United States with unrestricted, merit-based awards contemporary artists chosen through rigorous jury process involving panel internationally recognized curators.
addition Angeles, Artadia currently funds awards rotating cycle Atlanta, Boston, Chicago, Houston, Francisco.
Applications Artadia Awards were open visual artists media stage their career working living Angeles County area.
application available online three months from July September 2013. three jurors: Subotnick; Chus Martinez, Chief Curator Museo Barrio, York; Spencer Finch, Artist, York-named Finalists York October.
Artadia will present exhibition winning artists work Angeles January 2014.
